name: monday.com Ltd. Ordinary Shares
description: Monday.com Ltd is an artificial intelligence work platform that runs and orchestrates the core of all work. The platform democratizes access to software, including AI, enabling organizations to easily build applications and work management tools that fit their needs. The cloud-based platform is a no-code and low-code framework built from modular building blocks that are simple enough for anyone to use, yet powerful enough to drive core business across any organization. The platform also integrates with other systems and applications, creating a connective layer for organizations that links departments and bridges information silos. In addition to the core products, it introduced four core Al work capabilities: monday sidekick, monday vibe, monday agents, and workflows.
